title: New Stepford Connect BR Class 158 Express Sprinter
body:
**Disclaimer** This resource pack is not affiliated with or is an official product of Stepford County Railway. 

Hey guys Actron here, so I seen another retexture of Vitor2005's BR Class 158 which brought the old SCR livery to MTR so I thought to myself you know what we have the old livery whats stopping us from having the new one so I decided to retexture the old livery to add the new one to MTR and I would like to also give a special thanks to the MTR discord support team for helping me with squashing the bugs this retexture had while in development.

Enjoy ppl ~ Actron

For this mod to function you will need the [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway/versions) mod which I have linked for you

### Credits

Original model belongs to CW_315

Vitor2005 who ported over the model 

Szandorthe13th who provided the sounds

Big thanks to these legends for making this possible
